rows.finalText: For "What is the next right step in my calling", the clearest pattern sits in Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis. In Past, Mountain (21) shows where things already stand: progress may be slower but still viable. Mountain often points to the obstacle, delay, and effort layer of the situation, especially where progress may be slower but still viable in your calling. At the pivot, Present places Tower (19) at the center, where structure, authority, and boundaries dominate matters most. Here, Tower emphasizes distance, standards, official structure, and the part of the situation governed by rules rather than mood. Future closes with Heart (24), and the directional message is the need to choose what aligns with your core values when the pivot receives consistent attention. Heart colors your calling through what still feels genuinely meaningful, and the part of the path that remains emotionally true. What ties the vocational pattern together is the link between Tower (19) and Heart (24): a blend of institution and love, asking you to balance professionalism with connection while staying alert to idealizing without boundaries. Tower (19) shows where the whole sequence either opens or tightens. Tower colors your calling through distance, standards, official structure, and the part of the situation governed by rules rather than mood. Tower (19) with Heart (24) keep emphasizing a blend of institution and love, asking you to balance professionalism with connection while staying alert to idealizing without boundaries. Balance professionalism with connection so Heart (24) can land as lived experience rather than just possibility.
